title: Import Test Course
description: A minimal course to verify the import pipeline works correctly. Delete after testing.

sequences.title: Test Sequence
sequences.description: One of each step type to verify validation and import.

content.body:
This is a test instruction step.

If you can see this in the app, the import pipeline works.

content.prompt: Which of the following is true?

options.explanation: If you're reading this, it clearly isn't.
Correct. The data went from a JSON file through Zod validation into your Neon database and is now rendering in the app.

content.prompt: Describe in your own words what the import pipeline does. Where does the content start, what checks does it pass through, and where does it end up?
content.sampleAnswer: The content starts as a JSON file. The import script reads it, validates the structure with Zod schemas, validates each step's content against its type-specific schema, then writes it to the Neon database using Prisma. The app reads it from the database and renders it in the sequence player.
